property.name: title
property.label: Section Title
property.description: The title text for the section header

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text
property.description: Optional help text to display below the header

property.name: isWarning
property.label: Is Warning
property.description: Display help text as a warning in red

property.name: hideTitle
property.label: Hide Title
property.description: Hide the title and show only help text
